HOW TO: Bridge ETH To Stellar0x.

Bridging ETH to Stellar0x is an relatively simple process, all you have to do is transfer ETHEREUM to the provided PROXY ADDRESS. That's all that's needed, no hassles, no extra steps.

Stellar0x CHAIN PROXY ADDRESS:

0x0000000000000000000000988d21Fa8fAF74E97e

NOTE: Transactions take up to 5-10 Mins before arrival.
